strongest_reason_verdict_wrong: P1 treated as closed on demonstrated PRECISION (two planted phrases caught) not adequate RECALL. The affirmative-imperative matcher accepts contradictory paraphrases (roll this out / make the change live / advance it to production / apply the migration now) under hold/escalate. 'Fail closed' is a universal claim; two caught bypasses + one non-regression fixture do not establish closure. Merging as an enforced fail-closed protocol risks institutionalizing a false guarantee.
